title: Alzheimer MRI notebook record
summary: A supporting record for the Alzheimer’s disease MRI classification notebook, focused on dataset assumptions, staging labels, and ensemble experiments.

pageSections.title: Supporting notes
pageSections.markdown: The README makes clear that the repository is exploratory and notebook-first. That detail belongs in the archive because it shapes how the project should be evaluated: less like a production package, more like an explicit experiment log that includes preprocessing, model training, and ensemble comparison in one place.
